title: Add draggable icon toolbar with 6 security icons

requirements.text: Add Lucide React icons for Backdoor/Virus, Phishing Email, Cloud Server, Firewall, Router Device, and Scheduled Task to the AttackPathToolbar component
acceptanceCriteria: Six new icon buttons are added to the AttackPathToolbar using Lucide React library
Icons are arranged horizontally in the toolbar
Icons use appropriate Lucide React components (Bug/Shield for Backdoor, Mail for Phishing, Cloud for Cloud Server, Shield for Firewall, Wifi for Router, Clock for Scheduled Task)

requirements.text: Implement drag-and-drop functionality for the six security icons so users can drag them from the toolbar and drop them into the attack path diagram canvas

quotes: I could drag and drop in the diagram

acceptanceCriteria: Each icon button in the toolbar supports drag operations
Icons can be dragged from the toolbar and dropped onto the AttackPathCanvas
Dropped icons are placed at the correct coordinates on the canvas
The icon type information is preserved during drag-and-drop

requirements.text: Update the icon type definitions in AttackPathToolbar to include the six new security icon types: backdoor, phishing, cloud-server, firewall, router, and scheduled-task
acceptanceCriteria: Icon type enum or type definition includes all six new icon types
AttackPathIcon component can render all six new icon types
Icon type mapping correctly associates each type with its Lucide React icon component

requirements.text: Ensure dragged security icons integrate with existing AttackPathCanvas functionality including selection, movement, connection, and state management
acceptanceCriteria: Dropped icons can be selected, moved, and connected like existing icons
Icons are included in save/load diagram state operations
Icons can be deleted and support multi-select operations

constraints: Use Lucide React icon library exclusively for these icons
Do not modify backend diagram state schema
Icons must integrate with existing drag-and-drop and state management in AttackPathCanvas
nonGoals: Changing the visual style of existing toolbar elements
Adding filtering or search functionality for icons
Implementing custom icon designs or animations
